decisions.what: Preserved existing README sections (Overview, Technology Stack, Getting Started, Project Structure, Available Scripts, Deployment, License) and inserted the new sections (Component API, Customization Examples, Architecture, Performance, Browser Compatibility, Troubleshooting, Advanced Usage, Demo).
decisions.why: Spec explicitly says to keep existing sections and add the new ones.

decisions.what: Sourced the Component API prop types and defaults directly from src/types/animation.ts and src/components/FloatingScore.tsx (DEFAULT_DURATION=1.8, DEFAULT_DISTANCE=100).
decisions.why: Documentation must match the real implementation to be accurate and useful.

decisions.what: Embedded the exact Unsplash URL from the spec as the visual example in the Demo section, and noted that the live GitHub Pages URL is a placeholder.
decisions.why: Spec listed both the placeholder text and the exact image URL to include.

decisions.what: Created CONTRIBUTING.md with the eight required sections (Development Setup, Code Style, Commit Conventions, Pull Request Process, Project Structure, Adding New Features, Code of Conduct) plus a brief opening paragraph.
decisions.why: Spec enumerated the required sections explicitly; opening paragraph improves readability without exceeding scope.
